title: Models and Sculptures
blurb: From a sparrow's wing to a 12-meter dinosaur, our sculpting team works in FRP, fiberglass, metal, clay, and mixed media. Scientific accuracy guides every form.

title: Interpretation Centers
blurb: Turnkey design and build of visitor centers for forests, sanctuaries, and ecological sites — narrative, architecture, and exhibit in one continuous story.

title: Exhibits and Dioramas
blurb: Habitat dioramas, walk-through displays, and life-size scenes that place visitors inside the subject matter.

title: Informative Panels and Signages
blurb: Outdoor and indoor signage systems engineered for legibility, weather, and the cadence of a real site visit.

title: Books and Publicity Materials
blurb: Field guides, catalogues, brochures, and stakeholder publications — designed and produced end to end.

title: Film Making
blurb: Short films and documentary content for interpretation centers, museums, and institutional use.

title: Web Applications & Interactive Software
blurb: Companion web tools, digital archives, and visitor engagement platforms tied to physical exhibits.

title: Kiosks
blurb: Touch-driven interpretation kiosks: hardware specification through software interface, deployed and serviced on site.

title: AR & VR Applications
blurb: Augmented and virtual reality experiences for spaces where the subject matter cannot physically be shown — desert ecosystems, extinct fauna, geological time.
